item.title: Images of Note: No ultramarines
item.description:
J U D A S !
they can pick up every 10 station known to man and 10 known to monkeys
That's what they'd do for a Klondike bar
Two Crossbows!
sneaky
they have an iconic duo with a redhead
OUTRAGEOUS
Nuclear bombs go off It's the apocalypse
Well user, you made it to the bottom of the image, despite it's height.
(plays louder music)
the threatening uncrustable.
oh no
it's magic, you don't have to explain shit.
V I O L E N C E
yeah
I will never forget that priest
creech
POWER WORD: URETHRAL PROLAPSE!
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i guess
don't usually have to worry about lines at my local chipotles
what could go wrong?
finally
i'm known for doing this to people
i don't like it
no. only to see some childhood pets but beside that would be weird
always the clown
this is tough they all sound pretty sweet
i did not take this pic i want no part of this
but it's just so low rez!
something something anakin
who doesn't?
mmm hmm
it's not exciting
as is tradition
that's my time, have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: COMIC CON!
item.description: BRITISH FOLK AND OTHERS VISITING…COME FIND ME THIS WEEKEND AT COMIC CON AND SAY HI. I look crazy awkward in real life so that will be fun. xD You get to see my big snoz and chubby face in person. Please talk to me! Last time someone just took a photo and walked away, that was pretty awkward for me xD xD love you and can’t wait to see any of you there.
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: Amazing work
item.description: The cloisonné technique is a hot enamel method. It involves applying enamel and then firing it. The piece is then sanded several times to achieve a perfectly smooth surface flush with the metal.
item.dc:creator: Joxtar

item.title: Exactly this!!! Going no contact happens for a reason, stop pressuring people to talk to the toxic people in their lives. No matter who the fuck it is!

item.title: Thought he had the shits…I was so wrong.
item.description: We met at work decades ago and just got along like peas and carrots. Never any hint of sexual tensions and I always loved that I felt completely relaxed and could talk about anything with him with absolutely no weirdness. A few years ago we both moved a few states away and lost touch. I was recently recounting how lucky I was to find a true male friend with no sexual expectations. That mutual friend dropped the bomb that my guy jerked it before we hung out every single time, so he could just be cool. Honestly, I’m thankful I didn’t know at the time. But thinking back I’m really glad he did, it made for a really great friendship!
item.dc:creator: eyebrowarchedinconcern

item.title: Vacation
item.description: I get 31 days per year and I take every last second.

item.title: I Dare Each and Every Person to Find Something That Can Fix This Besides a Bible in Every Classroom
